Here is a complete summary of all **TODO** items found in the `webapp` project:

---

## 🔍 TODO Scan Results — `webapp/`

**2 TODOs found across 2 files.**

---

### 📄 `webapp/docs/README.md` — Line 28 (`## TODO` section)

This is a high-level backlog section listing **4 planned work items**:

| # | Work Item |
|---|-----------|
| 1 | **Add database persistence** — the app currently uses an in-memory store only |
| 2 | **Add authentication middleware** — no auth layer exists yet |
| 3 | **Add input validation on POST** — POST requests are not validated |
| 4 | **Add pagination for user listing** — the GET endpoint returns all users with no paging |

---

### 📄 `webapp/src/UsersController.scala` — Line 20 (inline code comment)

```scala
case "POST" =>
    // TODO: parse body, validate, add user   ← line 20
    Response(201, """{"status":"created"}""")
```

| # | Work Item |
|---|-----------|
| 5 | **Implement POST /users handler** — the handler stubs out a `201 Created` response but never actually parses the request body, validates input, or inserts a user into the store |

### ✅ Summary

| Priority | Item | Location |
|----------|------|----------|
| 🔴 High | Implement `POST /users` body parsing, validation & persistence | `UsersController.scala:20` |
| 🔴 High | Add database persistence (replace in-memory store) | `README.md:30` |
| 🟠 Medium | Add authentication middleware | `README.md:31` |
| 🟠 Medium | Add input validation on POST requests | `README.md:32` |
